governing_law.value: Laws of the State of California
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement will be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California without giving effect to conflict of laws principles.

audit_rights.value: 2TheMart may inspect and audit i-Escrow's records once every twelve months with 15 days notice.
audit_rights.exact_text: Once every twelve (12) months, 2TheMart through a CPA may inspect and audit such records to verify reports. Any such inspection will be conducted in a manner that does not unreasonably interfere with i-Escrow's business activities and with no less than fifteen (15) days notice.

fields.payment_terms: i-Escrow shall pay all amounts owed to 2TheMart within six (6) weeks of termination
fields.liability_cap: total fees paid in prior 12 months
